name: simulate_protocol
description: Run an OT-2 Python protocol script through opentrons_simulate (dry-run) and return the full simulation log text plus step count. Requires the OT_VENV_PYTHON environment variable to point to a Python executable in a virtualenv that has the opentrons package installed.

inputs.name: protocol_code
inputs.description: Complete OT-2 Python protocol script source code to simulate.

inputs.name: output_filename
inputs.description: Optional filename for the saved log file (default: simulation_output.txt).

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: JSON string with keys: log (full text), step_count, output_file, success (bool), or error on failure.
